effect.name: Comb Delay Line (non-interpolating)
effect.description:
Comb Delay Line (non-interpolating) (LADSPA 1889)
Based on work by James McCartney in SuperCollider.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Max Delay
parameter.comment:
Maximum delay.
Used to set the delay buffer size upon activation. Cannot be modulated.

parameter.name: Decay Time
parameter.comment:
Time for the echoes to decay
by 60 decibels. If this time is negative then the feedback coefficient will be negative, thus emphasizing only odd harmonics at an octave lower.
